MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to submit for of Judgment after 5/22/2007's Prove Up Hearing is heard this day. Court ordered OSC re-set to 10/25/2007 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Scott Hughes CSR#12365. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-30-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Cliff Capdevielle, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Pacifico Sotio and Arlene Sotio.
Plaintiff's Witness: Arlene Sotio, present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Lito Silverio as follows:
Total Damages $68,877.00
Counsel to prepare Judgment.
